overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi video game showing an armored character exploring a dimly lit industrial space station interior. The character walks through red-lit corridors, passes a seated NPC, and enters a hazy cantina called 'Reckoner's Core' with scattered patrons and neon lighting.

events.description: character walks through doorway from narrow corridor into a side room with a seated NPC

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow industrial corridor and entering a side room with metal furniture

notable_agents.action: seated in a chair against the wall wearing heavy armor

entered.detail: large metal ventilation pipes running along the ceiling
wall-mounted emergency light casting red glow on the corridor
open doorway leading to the adjacent room
long metal work desk with items scattered on top
simple metal chair with blue seat near the desk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow industrial corridor with red emergency lighting and visible pipework overhead. The character walks forward and transitions through a doorway into a small side room containing a metal desk and a seated NPC in armor.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional area approaching main cantina hall

events.description: space opens up into the main Reckoner's Core cantina area with visible signage

agents.ego_description: walking past the seated NPC and moving toward the open cantina area with scattered tables

entered.detail: illuminated sign reading 'Reckoner's Core' hanging from the ceiling
long counter with stools along the left side of the room
worn white couch positioned near the bar area
yellow triangular warning sign on the floor

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the side room into a larger transitional space. The 'Reckoner's Core' sign becomes visible overhead as the environment opens into a cantina layout with a bar counter, scattered tables, and a white sofa. The lighting shifts to a hazy greenish tone with red accent lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: Reckoner's Core cantina interior and exit corridor

events.description: character approaches and enters the orange-lit exit corridor at the back of the cantina

agents.ego_description: walking through the cantina past seated patrons toward the back exit doorway

notable_agents.action: seated at a table in the cantina wearing dark clothing

entered.detail: doorway leading to a brightly lit orange corridor
red wall banner with white skull symbol
narrow corridor with orange illuminated walls visible through the exit

segments.scene_description: The character traverses the main cantina floor, passing by seated NPCs and a red skull banner on the right wall. The space is hazy with scattered furniture and debris. The character approaches a doorway leading to an orange-lit corridor and enters it as the segment ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial corridor into the hazy, neon-lit expanse of a space station cantina. It begins in a narrow hallway defined by red emergency lighting and overhead pipework, moving forward through a doorway into a small side room where an armored NPC sits at a metal desk. As the character moves past this room, the environment opens into the Reckoner's Core cantina, where the lighting shifts to a hazy greenish tone accented by red glows and a prominent overhead sign. The camera then traverses the main floor past scattered furniture, seated patrons, and a red skull banner on the wall. Finally, the character navigates through the debris-strewn space toward a doorway, entering an orange-lit corridor as the scene concludes.
